@sample @demo @reference: DL-13 interaction-state check (I-17B mobile UI verification).
carrier: RN/platform interaction metadata via Detox (focused/pressed/disabled element state)

rules.description: keyboard/reachable focus has a visible focus indicator where deterministic metadata is available
pressed/active state is represented deterministically when applicable
disabled controls are represented in deterministic attributes/state

advisory_boundary: subjective interaction critique not backed by deterministic interaction-state metadata is advisory-only.
